rulings.Case Title: LAURA ESMERALDA CONTRERAS VS. CAROL BUTERWORTH et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Plaintiffs Voluntary Dismissal With Prejudice Of The Entire Complaint And For The Entry Of Judgment In Favor Of Defendants Curtis Dowling And Dowling And Marquez Llp
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 15, 2017 line 1. DEFENDANTs CURTIS DOWLING and DOWLING & MARQUEZ LLP's Motion To Vacate Plaintiffs Voluntary Dismissal With Prejudice Of The Entire Complaint And For The Entry Of Judgment GRANTED, subject to the moving party presenting a file endorsed copy of the proof of personal service of the motion papers that were filed on November 21, 2017. CRC 3.1300; CCP 1005, 1013. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: NIKOLAOS ARGYRAKIS VS. LEEANN BORAGNO LEEPER ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 15, 2017 line 2. DEFENDANTs LEEANN LEEPER, CHRISTOPHER BORAGNO, and ANGELINA LEEPER's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OFF CALENDAR per request of the moving party.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DINA MACHA VS. VICTOR MANUTE ET AL

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 15, 2017 line 3. PLAINTIFF DINA MACHA's Motion To Deem The Truth Of Matters Specified In Requests For As=Dmisions Set One, Admitted And Conclusively Established; Request For Order Awarding Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant Victor Manute In The Amount Of $960.00 OFF CALENDAR.
